title: Better Locale
description: Facilitates the usage of other languages that are not English in the game
body:
## Do you NOT talk English?
**(Previously called Localized Browser)**

If you do, I'm sure you have seen things like **á**, **ö** or something similar in your language then!

I'm sure you have had the problem of some graphemes (diacritics and the kind) not letting you browse in creative mode or in the recipe book peacefully and forced you to add them so you could find your precious item.

Well, I have a solution for you! And you just need to install this simple mod (NO SCAMS!) and you can search items without a care of the world. Were you trying to search ``Pistón`` but you wrote ``Piston``? Then this mod will gladly help you by ignoring the damn ``ó`` while trying to search!

If you have any suggestions, please do go to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/ImUrX/localizedbrowser/issues) or [my Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/7EnaAuaAwF)

### Features
* Ignore graphemes when using base letter (ex: ``a`` shows everything with ``á`` too)
* If you use a grapheme it will only show stuff with that grapheme
* IME Passthrough mode via `Alt`+`Space` (editable keybind)
* Extended Japanese IME support (Uses a dictionary which is downloaded when you have your language in Japanese, also supports romaji and hiragana to katakana)
* German letters simplifications (ü to ue, ö to oe, etc)
* An API for developers to use so they can have their mod better support other languages when doing queries

### Compatibility with mods
* EMI
* REI
* JEI
* Controlling (only IME)
